name: Urbit
compose:
name: slashnode-urbit
services:
  manager:
    image: mopfelwinrux/urbit-umbrel:v4.3
    container_name: urbit
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    environment:
      APP_PASSWORD: ${secret.APP_PASSWORD}
    volumes:
      - manager_piers:/data/piers
      - manager_keys:/data/keys
    ports:
      - 127.0.0.1:8090:8090
networks:
  slashnode:
    external: true
volumes:
  manager_piers:
    name: slashnode-urbit_manager_piers
  manager_keys:
    name: slashnode-urbit_manager_keys
